videoSnippet.title: "I don’t Think I Need to Say it" || Nodirbek Yakubboev vs Nihal Sarin || Titled Tuesday (2026)

Yakubboev, Nodirbek (2666) - Nihal Sarin (2786)
2026 Chess.com Open (Chess.com) [07] 2026.03.25
D85 Gruenfeld, exchange variation

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 g6 3.Nc3 d5 4.cxd5 Nxd5 5.e4 Nxc3 6.bxc3 Bg7 7.Be3 c5 8.Nf3 Bg4 9.Qd2 O-O 10.Be2 Qa5 11.Rc1 Nd7 12.h3 Bxf3 13.gxf3 e6 14.Rb1 Rab8 15.Rb5 Qc7 16.O-O a6 17.Rbb1 b5 18.f4 Rfd8 19.f5 Qc6 20.fxe6 Qxe6 21.Bf3 Qxh3 22.Bg2 Qh5 23.Qd1 Qh4 24.Qf3 Qe7 25.Rfd1 Rbc8 26.e5 b4 27.cxb4 cxd4 28.Rxd4 Nxe5 29.Rxd8+ Rxd8 30.Qb7 Qe6 31.Qb6 Qd7 32.Qxa6 Qf5 33.Rc1 h5 34.Qb7 Ng4 35.Bb6 Qf4 36.Qc7 Rd6 37.Re1 Be5 38.Qc8+ Kh7 39.Bc5 Rd2 40.Rxe5 Rd1+

judgment.comment: Checkmate is now unavoidable. a4 was best.
